summary: Completed P0 bug fix verification for NASSAQ School Management System. All 5 P0 fixes verified working correctly: 1) Schools Management shows card-based layout, 2) Sidebar logo has rounded corners, 3) User name/role visible when sidebar collapsed, 4) CreateUserWizard Next button validation working, 5) Platform Admin role available with 11 permissions.
passed_tests: 1. Schools Management Page - Card Layout - ✓ PASS
- 6 school cards displayed in grid layout (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 2xl:grid-cols-6)
- No table element found - card layout confirmed
- Cards show: name, code, type, stage, AI badge, health score, teachers, students, city, principal, last activity
- Verified in Sidebar.jsx line 251: className='h-10 w-auto rounded-xl'
3. Sidebar Collapsed - User Info Visible - ✓ PASS
- When collapsed, user name (first name 'مدير') is visible
- User role ('مدير المنصة') is visible under the logo
- Step 1: Next button DISABLED when no role selected
- Step 1: Next button ENABLED after selecting a role
- Step 2: Next button DISABLED when name is empty
- Step 2: Next button DISABLED when email is empty
- Step 2: Next button ENABLED after filling both name and valid email
- Platform Admin role ('مدير المنصة') is available in role selection
- Platform Admin shows 11 permissions in Step 3
- Each role shows its respective permissions correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing SAMPLE_SCHOOLS mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 fixes verified working: 1) TenantsManagement uses card-based layout with 6 school cards in grid. 2) Sidebar logo has rounded-xl class. 3) When sidebar collapsed, user name (first name) and role are visible. 4) CreateUserWizard validates Next button - disabled when required fields empty, enabled when filled. 5) Platform Admin role available with 11 permissions. All 8 roles display correctly with their respective permissions.

mocked_apis_list: SAMPLE_SCHOOLS array in TenantsManagement.jsx for demo schools data
generateMockUsers() for demo user data in UsersManagement
mocked_apis.note: Mock data is used for demo purposes when real data is not available

schools_card_layout.details: TenantsManagement.jsx uses grid layout with Card components, no table element

sidebar_logo_rounded.details: Logo img has class 'rounded-xl' in Sidebar.jsx

sidebar_collapsed_user_info.details: When collapsed, user name and role visible under logo
sidebar_collapsed_user_info.evidence: Sidebar text when collapsed shows 'مدير' and 'مدير المنصة'

wizard_next_button_validation.details: isStepValid() properly checks role selection, name, and email format
wizard_next_button_validation.evidence: Next button disabled/enabled states verified for all scenarios

platform_admin_role_available.details: platform_admin added to AVAILABLE_ROLES with 11 permissions
